title: Best Director Odds | Oscar Predictions, Favorites, 2026 Academy Awards Betting Guide
text: Paul Thomas Anderson is heavily favored to win Best Director for "One Battle After Another" at 92% odds. Other Nominees & Odds: Ryan Coogler ("Sinners") - 9%, Chloe Zhao ("Hamnet") - Long shot, Joachim Trier ("Sentimental Value") - Long shot, Josh Safdie ("Marty Supreme") - Long shot. Content writer Collin Whitchurch predicts Anderson will win, noting: "At 56, Anderson has spent the last 20 years transitioning from a young up-and-comer" into an established filmmaker. The analysis emphasizes that after 14 nominations without a win, "this is Anderson's year." The prediction suggests "there's no value here" for betting purposes, as the odds accurately reflect the likely outcome. Event Details: Date: Sunday, March 15, 2026, Venue: Dolby Theatre, Los Angeles, Broadcast: ABC, 7 p.m. ET, Host: Conan O'Brien
